title: GetDiscarded
description: Callers need to load a single discarded change by name for audit and CLI display. `GetDiscarded` resolves a name in `discarded/` only. It exists because `ChangeRepository.get` and `GetStatus` intentionally exclude discarded storage (so discarded names may be reused and terminal changes are not mutable via `mutate`).
context: Callers need to load a single discarded change by name for audit and CLI display. `GetDiscarded` resolves a name in `discarded/` only. It exists because `ChangeRepository.get` and `GetStatus` intentionally exclude discarded storage (so discarded names may be reused and terminal changes are not mutable via `mutate`).

rules:
`GetDiscarded.execute` SHALL accept a `GetDiscardedInput` with:

- `name` (string, required) — the discarded change slug to load

The use case MUST call `ChangeRepository.getDiscarded(name)`.

- If a discarded change exists, the use case MUST return `{ view: DiscardedChangeView }`.
- If no discarded change exists with that name, the use case MUST throw `ChangeNotFoundError`.

The use case MUST NOT fall back to `ChangeRepository.get(name)` or `getDraft(name)`.
`GetDiscarded` MUST NOT mutate persistence, append history events, or invoke `mutate`, `mutateDraft`, `save`, or `saveArtifact`.

constraints: Listing all discarded changes remains ListDiscarded.
This use case does not validate that a name is unused for CreateChange; name reuse is governed by active and drafted collision checks only.

scenarios.name: execute accepts GetDiscardedInput with name
then: it accepts the input without type errors

scenarios.name: execute rejects missing name at type level
then: name is a required string field

scenarios.name: execute propagates repository errors
given: ChangeRepository.getDiscarded throws an unexpected storage error
then: the same error propagates to the caller

scenarios.name: Discarded change returns view
given: a change exists only under discarded/ named old-experiment discarded with reason obsolete
then: it returns { view } where view is a DiscardedChangeView

scenarios.name: Active-only name is not found
given: a change exists only under changes/

scenarios.name: Drafted-only name is not found
given: a change exists only under drafts/

scenarios.name: Discarded-only name does not fall back to get or getDraft
given: a change exists only under discarded/
then: AND get(name) and getDraft(name) are not used to return a load result

scenarios.name: No save or saveArtifact on success
View returned is not a mutable Change
then: view is not an instance of domain Change

scenarios.name: Uses ChangeRepository port
when: GetDiscarded is constructed without a ChangeRepository
then: construction fails or execute cannot run

scenarios.name: Does not require ActorResolver
then: only ChangeRepository is required in its constructor
